headline: 3 Big Reasons to Love APA Corporation (APA)
summary: The past six months have been a windfall for APA Corporation’s shareholders. The company’s stock price has jumped 43.6%, hitting $38.35 per share. This was partly thanks to its solid quarterly results, and the performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
